query:
SELECT 
  bl.id as livestream_id,
  bl.brandId,
  bl.productId,
  bl.gmv,
  bl.salesAmount,
  bp.productName
FROM brand_livestreams bl
LEFT JOIN brand_products bp ON bl.productId = bp.id
WHERE bl.productId IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 20;

  bl.brandId,
  bl.productId,
  bl.gmv,
  bl.salesAmount,
  bp.productName

WHERE bl.productId IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 20;
